description: Create a complex GitHub Actions workflow named ci that automates a release process. On push to the master branch, it deletes any previous 'latest' release, creates a new draft release, and then uses MSYS2 to build and package a project for both 64-bit and 32-bit Windows environments using MXE. The workflow handles various build steps, including setting up the environment, running CMake and Ninja, and uploading the resulting installer as a release asset.
